attributes.action: Lower the social media ban to under thirteens not sixteen year olds.
attributes.additional_details: With the incoming ban for under sixteens on social media, a lot of people disagree, I, and others agree that sixteen is too high and that people over the age of thirteen can be very mature and know how to handle themselves when it comes to social media, thirteen year olds are more immature.
attributes.background: Lower the incoming ban on under sixteens on social media to the thirteen,

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: 

Government ban on social media to be for under 13s only
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757849
